name: 10.5" Recycled Glass Vase - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Upgrade your living space with this Recycled Glass Vase from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of 100% recycled glass, this transparent vase is shaped like a jar to bring a modern charm to your home decor. Fill it with water and style various fresh blooms or artificial stems to create a stunning, natural-looking arrangement anywhere in your home.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
